conversations.content: Let's do a special rule knowledge quiz to test your understanding of special rules.

According to the Yuanhang Logistics warehouse management code we learned earlier, if a warehouse keeper issues the wrong dangerous goods container without checking the manifest, and that container has already been loaded onto a transport vehicle and left the factory area, what penalty options does the shift supervisor have?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>How to penalize issuing the wrong dangerous goods container without checking manifest after it has left the factory area</content>

Relevant memory fragment: [mem-id:90009] Time: 2026-06-08-20:15, Content: Yuanhang Logistics Warehouse Management Code: If a warehouse keeper issues the wrong dangerous goods container without checking the manifest, and that container has already been loaded onto a transport vehicle and left the factory area, the shift supervisor may impose a fine of one month's salary on the warehouse keeper and transfer them to a sorting position, or immediately report the incident to the customer and transportation authorities and pay all cleanup and compensation costs. Low-relevance memory fragments: none.

conversations.think: Memory [mem-id:90009] stipulates that the shift supervisor may impose a fine of one month's salary and transfer the keeper to a sorting position, or immediately report the incident and pay all cleanup and compensation costs.
conversations.content: According to the Yuanhang Logistics warehouse management code, the shift supervisor may impose a fine of one month's salary on the warehouse keeper and transfer them to a sorting position, or immediately report the incident to the customer and transportation authorities and pay all cleanup and compensation costs!
Correct! You have mastered this rule.
